content.text:
<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Figma (figma@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Drive (google-drive@openai-curated-remote)
- Notion (notion@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Slack (slack@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>

Review the code changes against the base branch 'main'. The merge base commit for this comparison is 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc. Run `git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc` to inspect the changes relative to main. Provide prioritized, actionable findings.

input.input:
const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"grep -nE \"code-review|60dc076|branch-diff\" /Users/cysp/.codex/memories/MEMORY.md | head -20; cat /Users/cysp/.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md; git diff --stat 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc; git diff --name-status 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git log --oneline 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc..HEAD; git diff --unified=50 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc -- workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/token-policy-condition.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/token-policy-rules.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/token-policy.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/authentication.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/token-exchange.ts packages/oidc/src/issuer-adapter.ts packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"corepack pnpm test -- --run","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(JSON.stringify(r));

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/token-policy-rules.ts; sed -n '1,240p' workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/installation-token-issuance.ts; git diff --unified=30 60dc0766 -- workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/dependencies.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/installation-token-issuance.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/oidc-issuers.ts vitest.config.ts package.json","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git show 60dc0766:packages/github-actions-oidc/src/github-actions-principal.ts | sed -n '1,260p'; git diff 60dc0766 -- docs/service-contract.md README.md CONTEXT.md","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm lint","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(JSON.stringify(r));

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"cat packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/package.json; cat pnpm-workspace.yaml; git diff --check 60dc0766; corepack pnpm knip --no-progress","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(JSON.stringify(r));

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"grep -R \"TODO\\|FIXME\" -n workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions || true; sed -n '1,280p' test/token-policy-rules.test.ts; sed -n '1,220p' test/token-policy-normalization.test.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"grep -n \"condition\\|when:\" test/token-policy-matching.test.ts | head -80; sed -n '600,860p' test/token-policy-matching.test.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":16000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '380,475p' test/token-policy-matching.test.ts; sed -n '1,140p' test/support/token-policy-fixtures.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(r.output);
